\\n60: func (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\\n61: \\tresp, err := \\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\\n126: \\n127: \\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"boolean\\\", zap.Stringer(\\\"response\\\", resp))\\n128: \\treturn resp, nil\\n129: }\\n130: \\n131: func (s *Server) &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\\n139: \\t\\t\\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\\n140: \\t\\t}\\n141: \\t\\tlastRank int32\\n142: \\t)\\n143: \\n144: \\tvar (\\n145: \\t\\tstartTime     = \\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\\n151: \\n152: \\tdefer func() {\\n153: \\t\\tif err == nil {\\n154: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tnamespaceAttr,\\n175: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tflagAttr,\\n176: \\t\\t\\t\\t),\\n177: \\t\\t\\t),\\n178: \\t\\t)\\n179: \\t}()\\n180: \\n181: \\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\\n182: \\t\\tif \\n188: \\t\\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\\n189: \\t\\t\\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\\n190: \\t\\t\\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\\n191: \\n192: \\t\\t\\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\\n193: \\n194: \\t\\t\\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\\n195: \\t\\t\\tif normalizedValue < \\t\\t\\t\\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\\n199: \\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"threshold based matched\\\", zap.Int(\\\"rank\\\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\\\"rollout_type\\\", \\\"threshold\\\"))\\n200: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n201: \\t\\t\\t}\\n202: \\t\\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\\n203: \\n204: \\t\\t\\tvar (\\n205: \\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentMatches = 0\\n206: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n215: \\n216: \\t\\t\\t\\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\\n217: \\t\\t\\t\\tif matched {\\n218: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\\n219: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegmentMatches++\\n220: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n221: \\t\\t\\t}\\n222: \\n223: \\t\\t\\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\\n224: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n225: \\t\\t\\t\\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\\n226: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match ANY segments\\\")\\n227: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n228: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n229: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n230: \\t\\t\\t\\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\\n231: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"did not rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n238: \\t\\t\\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\\n239: \\n240: \\t\\t\\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"segment based matched\\\", zap.Int(\\\"rank\\\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\\\"segments\\\", segmentKeys))\\n241: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n242: \\t\\t}\\n243: \\t}\\n244: \\n245: \\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\\n246: \\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\\n247: \\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\\n248: \\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\\n249: \\n250: \\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"default rollout matched\\\", zap.Bool(\\\"enabled\\\", flag.Enabled))\\n251: \\treturn resp, nil\\n252: }\\n253: \\n254: // Batch takes in a list of legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\\n153: \\t\\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\\n154: \\t\\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\\n155: \\t\\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\\n156: \\t\\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\\n157: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\\n158: \\t\\t\\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\\n159: \\t\\t}\\n160: \\n161: \\t\\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\\n162: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n163: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\\n164: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, err\\n165: \\t\\t}\\n166: \\n167: \\t\\tvar (\\n168: \\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\\n169: \\t\\t\\tbuckets            []int\\n170: \\t\\t)\\n171: \\n172: \\t\\tfor _, d := range distributions {\\n173: \\t\\t\\t// don't include 0% rollouts\\n174: \\t\\t\\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\\n175: \\t\\t\\t\\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\\n176: \\n177: \\t\\t\\t\\tif buckets == nil {\\n178: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\\n179: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n180: \\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n181: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\\n182: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\\n183: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n184: \\t\\t\\t}\\n185: \\t\\t}\\n186: \\n187: \\t\\t// no distributions for rule\\n188: \\t\\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\\n189: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Info(\\\"no distributions for rule\\\")\\n190: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n191: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n192: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n193: \\t\\t}\\n194: \\n195: \\t\\tvar (\\n196: \\t\\t\\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\\n197: \\t\\t\\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\\n198: \\t\\t\\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\\n199: \\t\\t\\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\\n200: \\t\\t\\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\\n201: \\t\\t)\\n202: \\n203: \\t\\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\\n204: \\t\\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\\n205: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n206: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match any distributions\\\")\\n207: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n208: \\t\\t}\\n209: \\n210: \\t\\td := validDistributions[index]\\n211: \\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"matched distribution\\\", zap.Reflect(\\\"evaluation_distribution\\\", d))\\n212: \\n213: \\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n214: \\t\\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\\n215: \\t\\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n216: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n217: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n218: \\t} // end rule loop\\n219: \\n220: \\treturn resp, nil\\n221: }\\n222: \\n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\\n224: // on the match type.\\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\\n226: \\tconstraintMatches := 0\\n227: \\n228: \\tvar reason string\\n229: \\n230: \\tfor _, c := range constraints {\\n231: \\t\\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\tvar (\\n234: \\t\\t\\tmatch bool\\n235: \\t\\t\\terr   error\\n236: \\t\\t)\\n237: \\n238: \\t\\tswitch c.Type {\\n239: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n240: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\\n241: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n242: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\\n243: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n244: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\\n245: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n246: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = errs.ErrInvalid(\\\"unknown constraint type\\\")\\n251: \\t\\t}\\n252: \\n253: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n254: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"error matching constraint\\\", zap.String(\\\"property\\\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\\n255: \\t\\t\\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif match {\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// increase the matchCount\\n260: \\t\\t\\tconstraintMatches++\\n261: \\n262: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n263: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n264: \\t\\t\\t\\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n266: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\\n268: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n269: \\t\\t\\t}\\n270: \\t\\t} else {\\n271: \\t\\t\\t// no match\\n272: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n273: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n274: \\t\\t\\t\\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n276: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n277: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\\n278: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n279: \\t\\t\\t}\\n280: \\t\\t}\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\n283: \\tvar matched = true\\n284: \\n285: \\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n286: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n287: \\t\\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\\n288: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ALL constraints\\\"\\n289: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n290: \\t\\t}\\n291: \\n292: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n293: \\t\\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\\n294: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ANY constraints\\\"\\n295: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n296: \\t\\t}\\n297: \\tdefault:\\n298: \\t\\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"unknown match type %d\\\", segmentMatchType)\\n299: \\t\\tmatched = false\\n300: \\t}\\n301: \\n302: \\treturn matched, reason, nil\\n303: }\\n304: \\n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\\n306: \\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\\n307: }\\n308: \\n309: const (\\n310: \\t// totalBucketNum represents \\n355: \\treturn false\\n356: }\\n357: \\n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n359: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n360: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n361: nil\\n412: }\\n413: \\n414: func matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n415: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n416: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n417: \\t\\treturn {\\n189: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Info(\\\"no distributions for rule\\\")\\n190: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n191: \\t\\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n192: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n193: \\t\\t}\\n194: \\n195: \\t\\tvar (\\n196: \\t\\t\\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\\n197: \\t\\t\\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\\n198: \\t\\t\\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\\n199: \\t\\t\\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\\n200: \\t\\t\\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\\n201: \\t\\t)\\n202: \\n203: \\t\\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\\n204: \\t\\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\\n205: \\t\\t\\tresp.Match = false\\n206: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"did not match any distributions\\\")\\n207: \\t\\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n208: \\t\\t}\\n209: \\n210: \\t\\td := validDistributions[index]\\n211: \\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"matched distribution\\\", zap.Reflect(\\\"evaluation_distribution\\\", d))\\n212: \\n213: \\t\\tresp.Match = true\\n214: \\t\\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\\n215: \\t\\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n216: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n217: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n218: \\t} // end rule loop\\n219: \\n220: \\treturn resp, nil\\n221: }\\n222: \\n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\\n224: // on the match type.\\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\\n226: \\tconstraintMatches := 0\\n227: \\n228: \\tvar reason string\\n229: \\n230: \\tfor _, c := range constraints {\\n231: \\t\\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\tvar (\\n234: \\t\\t\\tmatch bool\\n235: \\t\\t\\terr   error\\n236: \\t\\t)\\n237: \\n238: \\t\\tswitch c.Type {\\n239: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n240: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\\n241: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n242: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\\n243: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n244: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\\n245: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n246: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\\n247: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n248: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\\n249: \\t\\tdefault:\\n250: \\t\\t\\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\\\"unknown constraint type\\\")\\n251: \\t\\t}\\n252: \\n253: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n254: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"error matching constraint\\\", zap.String(\\\"property\\\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\\n255: \\t\\t\\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif match {\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// increase the matchCount\\n260: \\t\\t\\tconstraintMatches++\\n261: \\n262: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n263: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n264: \\t\\t\\t\\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n266: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\\n268: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n269: \\t\\t\\t}\\n270: \\t\\t} else {\\n271: \\t\\t\\t// no match\\n272: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n273: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n274: \\t\\t\\t\\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n276: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n277: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\\n278: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n279: \\t\\t\\t}\\n280: \\t\\t}\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\n283: \\tvar matched = true\\n284: \\n285: \\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n286: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n287: \\t\\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\\n288: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ALL constraints\\\"\\n289: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n290: \\t\\t}\\n291: \\n292: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n293: \\t\\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\\n294: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ANY constraints\\\"\\n295: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n296: \\t\\t}\\n297: \\tdefault:\\n298: \\t\\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"unknown match type %d\\\", segmentMatchType)\\n299: \\t\\tmatched = false\\n300: \\t}\\n301: \\n302: \\treturn matched, reason, nil\\n303: }\\n304: \\n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\\n306: \\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\\n307: }\\n308: \\n309: const (\\n310: \\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\\n311: \\t// distribution and rollout\\n312: \\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\\n313: \\n314: \\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\\n315: \\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\\n316: )\\n317: \\n318: func matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\\n324: \\t}\\n325: \\n326: \\tif v == \\\"\\\" {\\n327: \\t\\treturn false\\n328: \\t}\\n329: \\n330: \\tvalue := c.Value\\n331: \\n332: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n333: \\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\\n334: \\t\\treturn value == v\\n335: \\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\\n336: \\t\\treturn value != v\\n337: \\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\\n338: \\t\\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\\n339: \\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\\n340: \\t\\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\\n341: \\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\\n342: \\t\\tvalues := []string{}\\n343: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\\n344: \\t\\t\\treturn false\\n345: \\t\\t}\\n346: \\t\\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\\n347: \\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\\n348: \\t\\tvalues \\n355: \\treturn false\\n356: }\\n357: \\n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n359: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n360: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n361: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\\n362: \\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\\n363: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\\n364: \\t}\\n365: \\n366: \\t// can't parse an empty slices.Contains(values, n), nil\\n382: \\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\\n383: \\t\\tvalues := []float64{}\\n384: \\t\\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil nil\\n412: }\\n413: \\n414: func matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n415: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n416: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n417: \\t\\treturn for a segment depending\n224: // on the match type.\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n226: \tconstraintMatches := 0\n227: \n228: \tvar reason string\n229: \n230: \tfor _, c := range constraints {\n231: \t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n232: \n233: constraints\n268: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n269: \t\t\t}\n270: \t\t} else {\n271: \t\t\t// no match\n272: \t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n273: \t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n274: \t\t\t\t// we resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar segmentMatchType string\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase core.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n\t\tcase core.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey), storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\t// match is true here because it did match the segment/rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.VariantKey = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.VariantAttachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\tresp.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tenv, err := s.store.Get(ctx, r.EnvironmentKey)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// try to get the environment from the context\n\t\t// this is for backwards compatibility with v1\n\t\tenv, err = s.store.GetFromContext(ctx)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tstore, err := env.EvaluationStore()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tflag, err := store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif flag.Type != core.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, store, env, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif s.tracingEnabled {\n\t\ts.addEvaluationEvent(ctx, env, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, r.EntityId, r.RequestId,\n\t\t\ttracing.AttributeVariant.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\ttracing.AttributeReason.String(tracing.ReasonToValue(resp.Reason)),\n\t\t\ttracing.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\t\ttracing.AttributeFlagTypeBoolean,\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, store storage.ReadOnlyStore, env environments.Environment, flag *core.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime       = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tenvironmentAttr = metrics.AttributeEnvironment.String(env.Key())\n\t\tnamespaceAttr   = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr        = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(environmentAttr, namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tenvironmentAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeFlagType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(environmentAttr, namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tenvironmentAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase core.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase core.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// this is not ideal as it could lead to a lot of swapping the environment store if requests are coming in for different environments\n\t\t// we will need to document that while you CAN use different environments in the same request, it is not recommended and could have a performance impact\n\t\t// but since we are using an in-memory map it's probably not that bad\n\t\tenv, err := s.store.Get(ctx, req.EnvironmentKey)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t// try to get the environment from the context\n\t\t\t// this is for backwards compatibility with v1\n\t\t\tenv, err = s.store.GetFromContext(ctx)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tstore, err := env.EvaluationStore()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf, err := store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase core.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, store, env, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif s.tracingEnabled {\n\t\t\t\ts.addEvaluationEvent(ctx, env, req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, req.EntityId, req.RequestId,\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeVariant.Bool(res.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeReason.String(tracing.ReasonToValue(res.Reason)),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(res.SegmentKeys),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeFlagTypeBoolean,\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase core.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, store, env, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif s.tracingEnabled {\n\t\t\t\ts.addEvaluationEvent(ctx, env, req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, req.EntityId, req.RequestId,\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeMatch.Bool(res.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeVariant.String(res.VariantKey),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeReason.String(tracing.ReasonToValue(res.Reason)),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(res.SegmentKeys),\n\t\t\t\t\ttracing.AttributeFlagTypeVariant,\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (s *Server) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType core.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase core.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase core.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase core.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase core.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase core.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase core.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase core.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tmatched := true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase core.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase core.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpContains:\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(v, value)\n\tcase flipt.OpNotContains:\n\t\treturn !strings.Contains(v, value)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n\nfunc getVariant(key string, variants ...*core.Variant) (*core.Variant, bool) {\n\tfor _, v := range variants {\n\t\tif v.Key == key {\n\t\t\treturn v, true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil, false\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":4,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4543,"cache_read_input_tokens":39803,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4543},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01J2xBMeT2yFSNDujmhUhUAP","session_id":"8b9e76d5-8d7c-468a-95e6-9992b5c10a7f","uuid":"14502db0-0a5b-4861-9176-002bbd1f40fa"}

depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, \"\", nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"\"\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn resp, segmentMatchType, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"\"\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn resp, segmentMatchType, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"\"\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tsegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn resp, segmentMatchType, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, \"\", nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":5,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1238,"cache_read_input_tokens":36366,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1238},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5FcuYsTWM5WGBfgfMBE61","session_id":"8b9e76d5-8d7c-468a-95e6-9992b5c10a7f","uuid":"e353280e-ec62-4637-956d-f91311b5bc30"}
